summary: Executed Sprint 3 Phase 1 backend+frontend validation on configured public runtime. Testing is blocked by runtime/deployment mismatch: configured URL serves placeholder app and required analytics/campaign stats endpoints return 404.

critical.issue: Returns 404 on configured public URL, so Voice IA BI metrics cannot be validated.
Returns 404 on configured public URL, so WhatsApp BI metrics cannot be validated.
Returns 404 on configured public URL, so analytics overview regression is blocked.

ui_bugs.issue: https://whatcem-modernize.preview.emergentagent.com renders generic placeholder ('Emergent | Fullstack App') instead of WhatCEM analytics/campaign dashboard.

integration_issues.flow: Analytics BI WhatsApp + Voice IA cards and Campaign Dashboard Voice AI navigation
integration_issues.issue: Cannot execute UI integration flow because target runtime is not the WhatCEM app build.

action_items: Align REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL runtime to deployed WhatCEM environment containing Sprint 3 analytics/campaign routes.
After runtime alignment, re-run backend stats tests and authenticated UI flow for /analytics and campaign dashboard navigation.
Ensure authenticated session is available in that aligned runtime before UI re-test.
critical_code_review_comments: Source code contains required routes (/api/campaigns/stats and /api/voice-campaigns/stats) and UI BI cards/navigation testids, but deployed runtime does not expose them.
Release/runtime drift is the root blocker, not the committed feature code in referenced files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md first (credentials present). Verify runtime alignment first: current /app/frontend/.env URL still serves placeholder and all requested endpoints return 404.
rca of the issue: RCA: deployment/runtime mismatch. Repro: open REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env -> placeholder page ('Emergent | Fullstack App'); run pytest on /api/campaigns/stats, /api/voice-campaigns/stats, /api/analytics/overview -> all 404. Mitigation: point configured public URL to correct WhatCEM deployment, then rerun authenticated backend+UI tests.
test_credentials: Read and verified from /app/memory/test_credentials.md: admin@whatcem.com / Sophia21# (not used because runtime mismatch blocked app scope).
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this run.
